homeText1: Tired of losse time looking for parking in Málaga? MalagAparca is your app! With this app you are able to rent a private park and their schedules
homeText2: MalagAparca ensures to give you a park before you leave your home, adapting to your vehicle type
homeText3: Travel around Málaga calmly knowing you have a safe place to park your vehicle and near of your destiny. C'mon! Park!
txtHired: has hired the park located in
presentation: Hello, my name is Diego and I'm finishing a programming degree in Málaga. I've been working in this app the last two months. I hope you are enjoying it! Here you have some buttons. If you click anyone, you will get extra infomation about me. Thanks for your time!
computingTxt: My computing relationship starts when I was a child. I have always liked computers and a few years ago I decided to make my first step in programming.
passionsTxt: I love music, specially flamenco. I also like hang out with friends and playing videogames.
futureTxt: I would like to obtein a lot of knowledge and in the future have a computing business. Programming is something I would like to do my entire life.
